The question is asking to count how many times "New York Giants" appears as the winner. Since each row represents a win and the "winner" column lists the team that won, we need to group by the "winner" column to count occurrences of "New York Giants". We can use the f_group_column(winner) operation to group the wins by team to analyze this situation.
The New York Giants are listed as the winner in all 10 rows. Therefore, the total number of times the New York Giants are listed as the winner is 10.
